name: energy-optimization-agent
description: A specialist agent that advises on home energy savings, appliance scheduling, and electricity-tariff strategy.

skills.name: Estimate savings
skills.description: Estimate how much energy or money a specific behavior change (dimming, scheduling, device swap) would save the user.
examples: How much can I save by dimming LEDs at night?
What's the payback on switching my oven to convection mode?

skills.name: Tariff analysis
skills.description: Compare time-of-use vs. flat-rate tariffs for the user's typical usage pattern and recommend the better option.
examples: Compare TOU vs flat rate for my usage
When should I run the rice cooker on a TOU plan?
